warranty.title: Warranty & Support
warranty.subtitle: Daikin stands behind every product we sell.

register.title: Register Your Product
register.description: Register within 30 days of purchase to activate your full warranty.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Contact any authorized Daikin service center with your proof of purchase and product serial number. Warranty claims are processed within 3–5 business days.
faq.a2: Warranty is voided by unauthorized modification, improper installation, physical damage, or use of non-genuine spare parts.
faq.a3: Warranty is tied to the product serial number, not the owner. If you sell your property, the remaining warranty transfers to the new owner automatically.
faq.a4: Consumables (filters), cosmetic damage, damage from power surges or natural disasters, and routine maintenance are not covered under warranty.
